description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main, on pull requests to any branch, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has four jobs: build, old-xarray, no-optional-deps, and mypy. Each job sets up a conda environment, installs cf_xarray, and runs tests or mypy checks. The build job uses a matrix to run on multiple Python versions and OSes, while the other jobs run on a single Python version. Code coverage is uploaded to Codecov for each job.
